initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT district.district_id
FROM trans
JOIN account ON trans.account_id = account.account_id
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE trans.amount > 10000
  AND trans.date LIKE '1997%'
GROUP BY district.district_id;

SELECT DISTINCT d.district_id
FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE t.amount > 10000
  AND t.date LIKE '1997%'
GROUP BY d.district_id;

  AND trans.date LIKE '1997%'
